_comment: MOCKUP — Webhook push broker. Exemple d'une requête HTTP POST envoyée à l'URL callback enregistrée par le broker (POST /api/v1/webhooks/subscribe).

_http_request._signature_recipe: X-Sentinel-Signature = 'sha256=' + HMAC_SHA256(broker_webhook_secret, X-Sentinel-Timestamp + '.' + raw_request_body). Replay-attack guard: broker MUST reject if abs(now - X-Sentinel-Timestamp) > 300s.

data.narrative_short: Bullish structure break on M15 with FVG retest at 2378-2381. Trend_bullish regime, vol +18% vs ATR14.
data.narrative_full: Algorithmic market analysis on XAU/USD M15 — bullish bias confirmed by Break of Structure followed by Fair Value Gap retest at 2378-2381. HMM regime classifier indicates trend_bullish (posterior 0.71) and the volatility forecaster anticipates moderate expansion (+18% vs ATR14). Structural invalidation at 2374.50; immediate target 2398.50-2401.20 with extension to 2412 on continuation. No active news blackout. White-label note: this narrative is rendered without 'Smart Sentinel' branding for broker integration in their end-user UI.

scenarios.condition: Bounce off 2378-2381 FVG with M15 close above 2385
scenarios.expected_outcome: Continuation toward 2401, extension 2412 if NY momentum sustains
Bullish read invalidated; bias shifts to range/bearish

compliance.disclaimer_text: Algorithmic market analysis for informational purposes only. The broker recipient is contractually obligated to surface this disclaimer to end users in its UI.
compliance.regulatory_notice: UE 2024/2811 — algorithmic analysis, not investment advice

_response_contract.auto_disable_action: Webhook is disabled and an email notification is sent to the broker admin contact after 10 consecutive failures.
